message:
feat(atc): Track 6 — load router with learning-augmented capacity model

AgentLoadModel with EWMA throughput tracking, reservation/inbox load
computation, and consistency-robustness tradeoff routing (λ anneals
toward classical heuristic when predictions are inaccurate).

select_route_target() picks the least-loaded agent while excluding
the requester and ATC itself. 10 new tests, 82 total passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
